title: Ipca Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Ipca Laboratories is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Ipca Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ipca Laboratories:
Ipca Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
